sections.paragraph:
Original: רמה

Transliteration: remâh

Phonetic: rem-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cast, throw
    1. (Peal)
      1. to cast
      2. to throw
        1. of tribute (figuratively)
    2. (Peil)
      1. to be cast
      2. to be placed, be set
    3. (Ithpeel) to be cast

Origin: corresponding to H7411

TWOT entry: 2997

Part(s) of speech: Verb
